@KobeissiLetter: BREAKING: The S&P 500 extends losses to -1.5% on the day, now down -$3.3 trillion since its June 2nd high.

@zerohedge: "Retail trading and options pricing suggest elevated expectations, while institutional investors express concern about the speed of the rally and the market being “One Big Trade” tied to AI" - Goldman

@zerohedge: "Most of my high level investor discussions focus on one major topic: when will the party end? Put another way, tech investors have made so much money in Semis so quickly that they are looking for potential warning signs that the music is about to stop." - JPM

@KobeissiLetter: On one hand, the market is pricing-in rate cuts and the AI Revolution. On the other hand, the market knows inflation is heating up into a weak labor market. The next few months will be very interesting.

@zerohedge: Goldman mid-day wrap We are currently skewed 3.8% better for sale. LOs are skewed 1.6% better to buy with demand in consumer discretionary, health care, and financials HFs are skewed 4.6% better for sale with supply in macro products, materials, and financials.
@zerohedge: The Market Is Starting To Price In Something Most People Still Don't See
@KobeissiLetter: These changes in the macroeconomic backdrop will have market-wide implications. We are trading it and will continue to capitalize on it.
